title: Intent Contract
description: Explicit human intent for a unit of agentic coding work, including scope, success criteria, non-goals, and constraints.

id.description: Unique identifier for this contract (e.g. ic-2025-06-001)

title.description: Short human-readable name for the work

source.description: Origin of the intent (issue URL, note, thread, etc.)

scope.description: What is in scope. Must be specific enough that membership is decidable.

success_criteria.description: Observable or measurable conditions that mean the work succeeded

non_goals.description: Explicit exclusions. Work must not do these even if locally reasonable.

constraints.description: High-level non-negotiable constraints (security, performance, legal, etc.)

author.description: Human or role who established the intent
